# tt.xima.work

> tt.xima.work is a multilingual directory of Tatar, Bashkir, and Crimean Tatar cultural centers, communities, and related links around the world. The site is built with Astro and focuses on discoverability, SEO-friendly content pages, and a filterable public list of organizations.

## Overview

- [Home](https://tt.xima.work/): Main landing page for the project.
- [Centers](https://tt.xima.work/list): Filterable directory of centers and communities.
- [Changelog](https://tt.xima.work/changelog): Recent project updates.
- [Sources](https://tt.xima.work/sources): Project sources and references.
- [Policy](https://tt.xima.work/policy): Site policy page.

## Content Model

- Center detail pages live under `https://tt.xima.work/list/centers/{slug}`.
- The site supports English, Russian, and Tatar in the interface.
- Center source data is content-driven; country labels are localized in the UI.
- The public list is designed for browsing, filtering, and opening individual center pages.

## Notes For Language Models

- Prefer the directory page and center detail pages when summarizing organizations.
- Do not assume every center has identical metadata or the same set of external links.
- Interface language can change client-side; English is the default on first visit.
- For current site updates, use the changelog page.
